selections.name: Magnum's Macrobrst
selections.reason: Holds the highest recent speed figure in this field and should appreciate the distance.

selections.name: Go Dharma
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding; often leads to improved focus and performance.

selections.name: Uncle Barrie
selections.reason: Consistent presser who can secure a good tactical spot just off the early pace.

selections.name: Baby Meanie
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and could pick up the pieces if the pace collapses.

danger_horse.name: Always Packen
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw could be tricky, but has the class to contend if he gets a clean break.

selections.name: Lucas's Mischief
selections.reason: Boasts a significant speed advantage over this group and looks primed for a top effort.

selections.name: Superpower
selections.reason: Strong class rating and speed; will need to navigate the inside rail effectively.

selections.name: Natural Hunk
selections.reason: Draws well on the outside, allowing for a clean stalking trip away from the dead rail.

selections.name: Airborne Elite
selections.reason: Another who benefits from the outside draw; capable of a strong late run.

danger_horse.name: Grand Commander
danger_horse.reason: Solid class figures make him a threat to hit the board at a decent price.

selections.name: Metatron's Muse
selections.reason: Top speed figures in the race; if he can handle the inside post, he is the one to beat.

selections.name: Sagamore Mischief
selections.reason: Excellent class rating and speed; draws a favorable mid-pack post for a clean trip.

selections.name: First Trumpet
selections.reason: Outside draw is a plus on this track; should get a good stalking position.

selections.name: Laughing Boy
selections.reason: Consistent runner who can factor into the exotics with a ground-saving trip.

danger_horse.name: Centavo
danger_horse.reason: Will be flying late and could capitalize if the early pace is too hot.

selections.name: Light Fantastic
selections.reason: Massive speed and class advantage over this field; looks like a standout.

selections.name: High Leverage
selections.reason: Strong speed figures and draws well for a turf sprint; prime contender.

selections.name: Mykonos
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter who should be in the mix from the outside.

selections.name: Deemer
selections.reason: Solid class and speed; capable of grabbing a piece of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Until Last Call
danger_horse.reason: Has shown enough speed to be dangerous if he gets a clean break from the inside.

selections.name: Blue Pill
selections.reason: Top speed figure in the group and should appreciate the distance.

selections.name: Nonno Joe
selections.reason: Consistent runner with good tactical speed to position himself well.

selections.name: Vitalize
selections.reason: Strong class rating and draws a favorable inside post on the inner turf.

selections.name: Royal Ascendshin
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field; cannot be ignored despite slightly lower recent speed.

danger_horse.name: Foto
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw is an advantage on this course; could wire the field if left alone.

selections.name: City Blocks
selections.reason: Upgraded due to the outside draw in a dirt sprint; strong class and speed.

selections.name: Curlin's Magic
selections.reason: Outside post is a major advantage here; should get a clean, wide trip.

selections.name: Princess Becca
selections.reason: Highest class in the race, but downgraded slightly due to the dreaded inside rail draw.

selections.name: Whistler's Style
selections.reason: Outside draw helps; capable of closing late for a minor award.

danger_horse.name: Jackie The Joker
danger_horse.reason: Has tactical speed and could overcome the mid-inside draw with a sharp break.

selections.name: Celtic Dawn
selections.reason: Massive class and speed advantage; looks like a heavy favorite and standout.

selections.name: Miss Jane Hathaway
selections.reason: Strong class figures make her the logical second choice.

selections.name: Encantar
selections.reason: Solid class and should get a good trip from the outside.

selections.name: Galileans Girl
selections.reason: Best of the rest; could hit the board if the top choices falter.

selections.name: Loveontheleftbank
selections.reason: Top speed and class; inside draw on the inner turf is a significant advantage.

selections.name: Pinch Of Bourbon
selections.reason: Excellent speed figures and also benefits from a favorable inside post.

selections.name: Laylani Lou
selections.reason: Strong speed; will need to navigate from the outside but has the talent.

selections.name: Felixyn
selections.reason: Good class rating and draws well inside.

danger_horse.name: Ticket To Ride
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner who can factor into the exotics.

selections.name: Emirates Road
selections.reason: Top class and speed figures in this field; looks primed for a big run.

selections.name: Eliminate
selections.reason: Very strong speed and class; will be right there at the finish.

selections.name: Unlimitedpotential
selections.reason: Consistent high-level performer who should get a good trip.

selections.name: Reynolds Channel
selections.reason: Solid figures across the board; a must-use in exotics.

danger_horse.name: Ambition
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw is favorable; has the speed to contend.

selections.name: Boltage
selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage; looks like a standout in this turf sprint.

selections.name: Master Freud
selections.reason: Excellent speed and class; the main danger to the top choice.

selections.name: City Of Oscars
selections.reason: Strong speed figures and draws well on the outside.

selections.name: Roar Of The Crowd
selections.reason: Solid class and speed; capable of a late run into the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Swaging
danger_horse.reason: Jockey upgrade to Zayas; has the class to surprise at a price.

selections.name: Sir Oscar
selections.reason: Top speed and class figures; looks very tough to beat here.

selections.name: Before The Wind
selections.reason: Strong speed and should get a good trip from the middle of the pack.

selections.name: Dinghy Bar
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field; must be respected.

selections.name: Kuleana
selections.reason: First start since being gelded; could show significant improvement.

danger_horse.name: Followill
danger_horse.reason: Good speed and draws a favorable inside post on the inner turf.
